creator: jessie_dasher@yahoo.com
text:
Perhaps this will help

FreeBSD FreeBSD.launchmodem.com 6.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE #0:  
Fri Jan 12 10:40:27 UTC 2007     root@dessler.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/ 
obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386

I downloaded the "6.2-RELEASE-i386-bootonly.iso" and did a standard  
install from the main FreeBSD ftp. Rebooted
and performed package add for Xorg. Rebooted and then did the package  
add for Gnome.


God Bless You,

Jessie Dasher

Trust in the LORD with all your heart, And lean not on your own  
understanding; In all your ways acknowledge Him, And He shall direct  
your paths. (Proverbs 3:5, 6, NKJV).
